design_philosophy: A calm, premium, minimal AI experience (Sansara) fused with glow, motion, and futuristic elements (Voxr). Dark futuristic UI using high-end glassmorphism and neon gradient glow effects (Cyan -> Blue -> Purple) against a deep void background.

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: p-8, p-12, p-16 for structural sections. Containers must have internal padding p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Mix spans to create asymmetry. Never fill 100% perfectly on marketing sections.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense, data-heavy, full utilization.
spacing_and_layout.chat_layout: Strict h-screen with overflow-hidden on body. Collapsible sidebar with fixed width (260px). Main chat area uses overflow-y-auto. Input bar fixed at bottom of chat area.

surfaces.tracing_beam_card: Cards with animated neon gradient borders. Inner background #0A0A12.
surfaces.headers: Crystal glass: backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#05050A]/60 border-b border-white/10

rules: Fade-in + slide-up staggered on load for all major sections.
Hover scale effects on cards (scale 1.02) with increased border opacity and shadow glow.
Glowing pulse effects on primary buttons and abstract background orbs.
Chat sidebar slide-in/out via GSAP animating the width and opacity.
Typing animations using GSAP text plugins or stagger.

landing.description: Marketing page. High visual impact. Hero with glowing abstract background. Feature bento grid. Demo chat preview.

about.description: Storytelling page. Mission, vision, problem/solution. Use academic imagery with dark mode styling.

chat_assistant.description: Core app page. Left sidebar (conversations list). Center chat area (auto-scroll). Bottom fixed input (glassmorphic, paperclip, mic icons).

dashboard.description: Minimal clean layout. Usage stats cards, query charts, response time metrics. Suble hover animations.

settings.description: Fix overflow bugs. Scrollable container. Profile, Security (working toggles), Notifications, Appearance, Data/Privacy.

images.description: Abstract dark futuristic AI glowing orb background for landing page hero.
Dark mode premium academic library for About page background or vision section.
Abstract dark glassmorphism background for Dashboard/Settings.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT alter any backend logic, API routes, or database configurations.
For the Chat Assistant page, fix the scrollbar issues. Ensure the body has overflow-hidden, and ONLY the chat messages container has overflow-y-auto. The input bar must be fixed at the bottom.
Implement the animated collapsible sidebar using GSAP. It should slide in/out smoothly without breaking layout.
Use GSAP for page transitions, fade-ins, card hover effects, and glowing center animations on the landing page.
Integrate Lucide React or Phosphor Icons for UI icons (e.g., paperclip, mic, send arrow).
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactive elements (like Select, Dialog, Tabs) but strip default styling and apply the dark glassmorphism theme defined in these guidelines.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for marketing page sections (Landing, About) to allow full creative freedom with bento grids and overlap.
Ensure toggle switches in the Settings page actually function visually and do not freeze the UI.
